name: Dark World Accession
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>暗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>登</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During the Main Phase: Fusion Summon 1 Fiend Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing materials mentioned on it from your field or GY. If Fusion Summoning a "Dark World" monster this way, you can also discard monsters as material. During your Main Phase, if this card is in your GY: You can add this card to your hand, then discard 1 "Dark World" monster. You can only use each effect of "Dark World Accession" once per turn.
eff: During the Main Phase: Fusion Summon 1 Fiend Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing materials mentioned on it from your field or GY. If Fusion Summoning a "Dark World" monster this way, you can also discard monsters as material. During your Main Phase, if this card is in your GY: You can add this card to your hand, then discard 1 "Dark World" monster. You can only use each effect of "Dark World Accession" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck R: Devil's Gate The Doors of the Abyss Opened Pack

action: Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Discards Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
